task: Restore and evolve the FrankX music-led homepage into a living studio and intent-driven mind palace.
surface: FrankX homepage hero and Mind Palace Atlas
audience: Friends, family, creators, founders, builders, and curious visitors seeking music, learning, tools, or direction.
first_read: FrankX is a personal living studio; music is immediately available; every visitor can choose a clear next room.

references.label: Previous music-led FrankX homepage
references.reason: Preserves the studio breadth and embedded music entry that the owner explicitly wants restored.

references.label: Current proof-led FrankX homepage
references.reason: Preserves evidence-before-adjectives, bounded claims, and clear route discipline.

references.label: God Mode GSAP pattern library
references.reason: Defines the one-scene limit, final-state utility, matchMedia cleanup, and signal-route brand physics.

keep: User-initiated Suno music in the opening composition
Real studio work across music, agents, books, design, and field notes
Warm founder voice and a route for people who need reflection rather than commerce
avoid: Autoplay sound, scroll hijacking, and continuous text motion
Unverified counts, revenue claims, outcomes, scarcity, or latest-release labels
Decorative orbs, fake dashboards, abstract topology, and uninspected generated media
direction.signature: Six real signals converge into one calm, clickable mind-palace map.
system: Near-black editorial canvas with restrained emerald and cyan signal accents
Static, readable founder thesis paired with a real embedded studio release
One GSAP ScrollTrigger timeline using transform and opacity only
Native scroll with static mobile, coarse-pointer, and reduced-motion compositions
Semantic route rail rather than interchangeable feature cards

asset_quality.why_premium: The primary asset is Frank's real, reviewed Suno release and the page routes to inspectable work rather than decorative filler.

artifacts.notes: Music-led page assembly; browser inspection pending.
Signature GSAP scene; desktop, mobile, and reduced-motion proof pending.
Human-reviewed featured-release source; no raw-catalog auto-promotion.

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.evidence: Tier A: real owned music and inspectable studio work are the primary proof.

checks.name: music-release-governance
checks.evidence: Featured source is explicitly approved and weekly candidates remain human-gated.

checks.name: motion-contract
checks.evidence: One-scene limit, native scroll, cleanup, and static fallback are specified before implementation.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.evidence: Machine browser-qa admission is currently on hold.

checks.name: visual-qa
checks.evidence: Desktop, mobile, and reduced-motion captures are pending.

checks.name: vercel-preview
checks.evidence: Preview follows a coherent local verification pass and one batched push.

score.notes: Direction and primary asset pass; export inspection, browser QA, and preview evidence remain required.

known_risks: The inherited long-form homepage still contains repeated card grids that need evidence-led consolidation.
The current approved opening track is a stable studio release, not an automatically inferred latest track.
Browser and preview gates depend on machine admission recovering from hold.
